title: Luna in Mavrica Barv
style_card: Soft watercolor children's book illustration style with gentle brushstrokes and dreamy textures. Palette: pastel rainbow colors (#FFB3D9 pink, #B8E6FF sky blue, #FFF4B3 yellow, #C9FFB3 mint green, #E6CCFF lavender, #FFD4B3 peach) with soft white backgrounds and subtle cloud textures. Lighting: warm, diffused natural light as if on a sunny morning. Line weight: thin, delicate black outlines for definition but not harsh. Shading: minimal, using lighter/darker color variations only. Composition: centered subjects with plenty of breathing room, low camera angles (child's eye view), safe margins for text placement at top or bottom. Recurrent motifs: small sparkles, soft round shapes, gentle curves. DO NOT use: photorealism, sharp edges, dark shadows, cluttered backgrounds, logo marks, text overlays, adult themes. DO use: rounded friendly shapes, smiling faces, clear focal points, inviting warm atmosphere.

character_bible.name: Luna

colors.hair: short curly brown hair with small yellow hair clip
colors.outfit: soft yellow dress with white collar, white socks, red shoes

character_bible.notes: Always smiling and curious. Big round eyes full of wonder. Small stature, toddler proportions. Expressive hands - often reaching or pointing. Never sad or scared, always joyful and engaged.
character_bible.scale: small child, about 1/3 of page height when standing

pages.text: To je Luna. Luna ljubi barve.

Page 1 of "Luna in Mavrica Barv". Age band 3-5 years.

Scene: Luna standing in a garden full of colorful flowers and butterflies. She is smiling widely with her arms spread open in joy. The background has soft pastel flowers in various colors.

Character: Luna - young girl, 4 years old. short curly brown hair with small yellow hair clip, wearing soft yellow dress with white collar, white socks, red shoes. Always smiling and curious. Big round eyes full of wonder. Small stature, toddler proportions. Expressive hands - often reaching or pointing. Never sad or scared, always joyful and engaged.

Continuity: Morning light, sunny day, outdoor garden setting

Framing: Square format (1:1 aspect ratio), centered composition with breathing room, low camera angle (child's eye view). Keep text-safe margins at top or bottom third.

Mood: joyful and welcoming

Quality: High-detail watercolor illustration, clean soft edges, no watermark text, no photorealism, children's book illustration style only.

Aspect ratio: 1:1 (square).
